preEdit.command: echo '⚠️  Modifying Core API Java file — remember: no Lombok, no raw SQL, records for DTOs'
echo '⚠️  Modifying Runner Service — remember: Docker SDK, isolated network, resource limits'
echo '⚠️  Modifying AI module — remember: prompt templates in config, retry with backoff, mask API keys in logs'
echo '⚠️  Modifying Flyway migration — NEVER edit an existing migration, only add new ones. Check the latest V number.'

postEdit.description: Quick compile check after editing Core API
Quick compile check after editing Runner Service

preCommit.description: Run Core API tests before commit

preCommit.command: grep -rn 'TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX' --include='*.java' core-api/src/main/ runner-service/src/main/ | head -10 && echo '--- Check TODOs above before committing ---'

grep -rn 'password\|secret\|token\|apikey\|api_key' --include='*.java' -i core-api/src/main/ runner-service/src/main/ | grep -v '@ConfigProperty' | grep -v 'test' | grep -v '//' | head -5 && echo '--- ⚠️  Check for hardcoded secrets above ---'
